title: The Forgetting Cure: Brain-Inspired Anti-Forgetting Experiment

close_reason: Completed: Built core foundation — matrix.py (pure-Python matrix ops, no numpy), network.py (multi-head NN with forward/backprop/SGD/save-load/grow, Strategy ABC), mnist.py (IDX loader with task splitting), metrics.py (accuracy/BWT/FWT/forgetting), config.py (all hyperparameters). All imports verified, unit tests pass.
description: Build src/core/ — matrix.py (from-scratch matrix multiply, transpose, element-wise, broadcasting — NO numpy), network.py (base NN class with forward/backprop, Strategy interface), mnist.py (MNIST IDX loader — may use numpy/struct for parsing only, returns plain Python lists), metrics.py (accuracy, backward transfer, forgetting measure), config.py (all hyperparameters). Files: src/core/__init__.py, src/core/matrix.py, src/core/network.py, src/core/mnist.py, src/core/metrics.py, src/core/config.py
title: Core Foundation: matrix ops, network, MNIST loader, metrics, config

close_reason: Completed: Implemented NaiveStrategy - naive sequential baseline with plain SGD, no anti-forgetting protection. Implements all Strategy ABC methods (train_task, evaluate, on_task_complete as no-op, get_all_accuracies). Import test and smoke test pass.
description: Implement naive sequential training with no anti-forgetting mechanism. Train the base network on 5 MNIST digit-pair tasks sequentially. This is the baseline showing catastrophic forgetting. Files: src/strategies/naive/__init__.py, src/strategies/naive/naive.py. Must import from src/core/, implement Strategy interface.
title: Strategy: Naive Sequential Baseline (no protection)

close_reason: Completed: Implemented EWC strategy with Fisher Information Matrix computation, per-task snapshots, and EWC penalty during training. Files: src/strategies/ewc/__init__.py, src/strategies/ewc/ewc.py
description: Implement EWC — after each task, compute Fisher Information Matrix for all weights. Add penalty Loss = Task_Loss + λ*Σ F_i*(θ_i - θ*_i)² with λ=1000. Files: src/strategies/ewc/__init__.py, src/strategies/ewc/ewc.py. Must import from src/core/, implement Strategy interface.
title: Strategy: EWC (Elastic Weight Consolidation)

close_reason: Completed: Implemented NeurogenesisStrategy with progressive growing - grows hidden layers by 32 neurons per task, freezes old weights via per-batch snapshot/restore, only trains new connections + current task head
description: Implement neurogenesis — for each new task, add 32 neurons per hidden layer. Freeze existing neuron weights (mature neurons). Only train new neurons + new task head. Files: src/strategies/neurogenesis/__init__.py, src/strategies/neurogenesis/neurogenesis.py. Must import from src/core/, implement Strategy interface.
title: Strategy: Neurogenesis (Progressive Growing)

close_reason: Completed: Sleep Replay with Distortion strategy - replay buffer, distorted replay (gaussian noise, pixel shifts, patch masking), sleep phase between tasks
description: Implement sleep replay — after each epoch, replay 100 distorted samples from previous tasks (Gaussian noise σ=0.1, random 1-2px shifts, partial images). Between tasks, run 10 epochs of pure replay (sleep phase). Files: src/strategies/replay/__init__.py, src/strategies/replay/replay.py. Must import from src/core/, implement Strategy interface.
title: Strategy: Sleep Replay with Distortion

close_reason: Completed: Implemented CLS dual-memory strategy with fast learner (hippocampus) and slow learner (neocortex), pseudo-rehearsal via knowledge distillation, and interleaved training across all tasks
description: Implement CLS dual memory — Fast learner (64-32 neurons, lr=0.05) learns new tasks quickly. Slow learner (256-128 neurons, lr=0.001) receives interleaved pseudo-examples from fast learner. Test only the slow learner. Files: src/strategies/cls/__init__.py, src/strategies/cls/cls.py. Must import from src/core/, implement Strategy interface.
title: Strategy: CLS (Complementary Learning Systems — Dual Memory)

close_reason: Completed: Built hybrid discovery combiner with 4 hybrid strategies (EWCReplay, NeurogenesisCLS, FullBrain, TopTwo) and HybridCombiner orchestrator. All imports and smoke tests pass.
description: Build src/hybrid/combiner.py — combine strategies: EWC+Replay, Neurogenesis+CLS, All 4 combined (full brain), Top 2 performers combined. Test all hybrids on same task sequence. Files: src/hybrid/__init__.py, src/hybrid/combiner.py. Must import from src/core/ and all strategy modules.
title: Hybrid Discovery: Combine strategies and find optimal brain recipe

description: Build src/main.py and src/report.py. main.py: download MNIST, run naive baseline, all 4 strategies, hybrid combinations, generate report. report.py: generate CSV (output/results.csv), accuracy matrix heatmap PNG, learning curves PNG, backward transfer bar chart PNG, discovery.md summary, results.json for webapp. Uses matplotlib for charts. Files: src/__init__.py, src/main.py, src/report.py, output/ directory.
title: Experiment Runner and Report Generator

description: Build output/index.html — single self-contained HTML file. Dark neuroscience theme. 6 sections: Hero (animated title), Forgetting Cliff (interactive Chart.js line chart), Strategy Cards (2x2 grid with expand), Accuracy Matrix (interactive heatmap), Build Your Own Brain (toggle switches + radar chart), Discovery (auto-generated findings). Uses Chart.js via CDN. Reads output/results.json. Fallback if no data. Files: output/index.html only.
title: Interactive Webapp: The Forgetting Lab visualization
